text: 坚持长期计划比你想象中难得多，因为我们的目标和想法总在改变。
I never wanted to become rich, I just wanted to become independent.
用财富作为保护措施对抗对他人之依赖或操控的恐惧。Make every decisions without being afraid.
I want to earn enough money I can get away from everyone.
You should have enough cash in your portfolio. The amount of cash you should have should feel like it's too much. It should make you wince a little bit.
敢用你那严格的目光，审视一下自己的人生吗？
最确实的无言，不是沉默，而是说话。
Are you brave enough to swim against the tide?
The opposite of anxiety is concretization.
首先要了解自己知之甚少，明白我们的知识和需求的核心正是无知。
Deeply know it, doesn't mean you can get over it.
In dark times, should the stars also go out?
好好活着为了享受书影音和游戏。
再次重逢的世界，直到新社会到来；我们所希冀的未来，在没有黑暗的地方相遇
埋骨何须桑梓地，人生无处不青山
